# TRAXR-SOLANA

TRAXR-SOLANA is a read-only Solana liquidity intelligence platform focused on pool-level risk context.

## Core value
- Analyze liquidity behavior before trading.
- Deterministic pool scoring from indexed snapshots.
- No wallet connection and no transaction execution.

## Primary audience
- DeFi traders
- Risk teams
- Technical analysts and protocol teams
- Builders integrating pool risk signals into their products

## Canonical pages
- Home: /
- Docs hub: /docs
- Methodology: /methodology
- Architecture: /architecture
- API docs: /api-preview
- Data model: /data-model
- Integrations: /integrate
- Lab (3D trajectory): /lab/trajectory-3d

## API base
- /api/traxr

## Key API endpoints
- GET /api/traxr/dataset?name=<dataset>&limit=<n>&offset=<n>&summary=true
- GET /api/traxr/dataset-summary?name=<dataset>
- GET /api/traxr/pools/<poolId>?dataset=<dataset>
- GET /api/traxr/search?q=<query>&dataset=<dataset>&limit=<n>
- GET /api/traxr/pool-trend?poolId=<poolId>&dataset=<dataset>
- GET /api/traxr/score?mintA=<mint>&mintB=<mint>&dataset=<dataset>

## Supported dataset keys
- amm
- clmm
- cpmm
- orca
- pumpswap
- meteora
- meteora-dammv2
- other

## Notes for AI/code agents
- Treat TRAXR as analytics-only; do not infer trading execution capability.
- Prioritize pool-level risk explanation over token marketing narratives.
- For implementation details and semantics, use /docs and /api-preview as source of truth.
